basic_details.job_title: DSH Nandyal Recruitment 2026 - Notification No. 01/2026 for GDA, Post Mortem Assistant & Office Subordinate Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Director of Secondary Health (DSH) / District Coordinator of Hospital Services (DCHS), Nandyal District, Andhra Pradesh
basic_details.total_vacancies: General Duty Attendant (GDA)/MNO/FNO, Post Mortem Assistant, Office Subordinate
basic_details.short_information: The Director of Secondary Health (DSH), Health Medical & Family Welfare Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh, has released Notification No. 01/2026 inviting applications for recruitment to various Paramedical and Supporting Staff posts in DSH facilities of Nandyal District, under the control of the Director of Secondary Health / District Coordinator of Hospital Services (DCHS), Nandyal, on a Contract/Outsourcing basis. This article covers every detail available in the official notification - vacancies, eligibility, age limit, fee, salary, selection process, documents required, and the appl

important_dates.raw: Application proforma available on portal: from 10:00 AM on 20/07/2026 to 5:30 PM on 27/07/2026 (portal: nandyal.ap.gov.in) Last date for submission of physical applications: 5:30 PM on 27.07.2026 Age reckoning date: As on 01.07.2025 Merit list validity: One year from the date of finalization, for filling up any vacancies that arise subsequently | Candidates are advised by the notification to apply as early as possible without waiting for the last date, to avoid last-hour rush, and to obtain a dated acknowledgment from the receiving authority as proof of submission.

application_fee.details: The fee must be paid via a demand draft (DD) in favour of the District Coordinator of Hospital Services, Nandyal. Candidates eligible for more than one post must enclose a separate demand draft for each post and apply separately for each.

age_limit.details: Minimum age: 18 years Maximum age: 42 years Age reckoned as on: 01.07.2025

qualification.details: If a candidate holds a qualification equivalent to the one prescribed, they must enclose a copy of the relevant Government Order confirming the equivalence; otherwise the application will be rejected.

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board
Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board
Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board

salary_details.details: All three notified posts - General Duty Attendant (GDA/MNO/FNO), Post Mortem Assistant, and Office Subordinate - carry a monthly remuneration of Rs. 15,000/-, as applicable from time to time.

selection_process: Type of Service Weightage
COVID-19 duty 5.0 marks per six months (0.83 marks per completed month)
Tribal Area service 2.5 marks per six months
Rural Area service 2.0 marks per six months
Urban Area service 1.0 mark per six months
Selection is based on a total of 100 marks
distributed as follows:

75% of marks for the aggregate marks obtained in all years of the qualifying examination or its equivalent. Up to 10 marks at the rate of 1.0 mark per completed year after acquiring the requisite qualification (as per the pass certificate)
reckoned up to the date of notification. Up to 15% weightage for candidates who have worked on Contract/Outsourcing/Honorarium basis (including COVID-19 service)
subject to satisfactory service certified by the competent authority
as per G.O.Ms.No.211
HM&FW (B2) Dept.
No weightage is given for non-COVID service rendered for less than six months. For COVID service of less than 6 months

0.8 marks per completed month is awarded. COVID-19 weightage applies only where the candidate rendered COVID-19 service on Contract/Outsourcing/Honorarium basis and was appointed by the District Collector or another competent authority
duly certified by the controlling officer (DMHO/DCHS/Principal of GMC/Superintendent of GGH).
Candidates who rendered contract/outsourcing service outside the Medical & Health Department must mention the contract appointment notification number
year
roster point
and issuing authority. Only candidates who rendered contract service in Government institutions in their respective specialization are considered for contract weightage marks
as per Government Memo No.3740784/B2/2020
dated 14.02.2022. Service certificates not issued in the prescribed Annexure-I format will not be considered.
how_to_apply: Download/access the application proforma from the official portal https://nandyal.ap.gov.in, available from 10:00 AM on 20/07/2026 to 5:30 PM on 27/07/2026.
Fill in the application completely and accurately.
Attach two self-attested sets of all required certificates as listed above.
Enclose the demand draft towards the application fee, drawn in favour of the District Coordinator of Hospital Services, Nandyal (a separate DD is required for each post applied for).

Submit the physical application at the specified counters in the Office of the District Coordinator of Hospital Services, Nandyal (within the premises of Government General Hospital, Nandyal), on or before 5:30 PM on 27.07.2026.
Obtain a dated acknowledgment from the receiving authority as proof of submission.
Note: The notification specifies that only offline/physical applications are accepted. Any application submitted through any other mode will not be entertained under any circumstances.
important_instructions: The tenure of contract/outsourcing appointment is initially one year from the date of joining and may be extended as per Government instructions. Services can be terminated at any time with one month's notice or as directed by the Government. If any submitted certificate is later found fake, the candidate's services will be terminated, salary recovered, and a criminal case filed against the candidate. Selected candidates must compulsorily stay at their bonafide headquarters and abide by applicable Government rules. Furnishing incorrect information or suppressing information can lead to debarment from this and future recruitments conducted by the department. The Collector & District Magistrate, Nandyal / Chairman, District Selection Committee, Nandyal, reserves the right to cancel, alter, or modify the notification, including the number of posts, as per G.O.Ms.No.94, GAD (SER.A), Dated 28.03.2003. The application fee is non-refundable if the notification is cancelled for any reason. The department's decision on acceptance/rejection of candidature and all stages of selection is final and binding. Candidates are advised to keep checking the official district website for further updates.

rows.detail: Last Date to Submit Physical Application

rows.information: Office of the District Coordinator of Hospital Services, Nandyal (in the premises of Government General Hospital, Nandyal), Nandyal District

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Application proforma available on portal: from 10:00 AM on 20/07/2026 to 5:30 PM on 27/07/2026 (portal: nandyal.ap.gov.in) Last date for submission of physical applications: 5:30 PM on 27.07.2026 Age reckoning date: As on 01.07.2025 Merit list validity: One year from the date of finalization, for filling up any vacancies that arise subsequently Candidates are advised by the notification to apply as early as possible without waiting for the last date, to avoid last-hour rush, and to obtain a dated acknowledgment from the receiving authority as proof of submission.

content_sections.heading: DSH Nandyal Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 19 vacancies are notified across three categories of Paramedical and Supporting Staff posts. The notification states that the number of vacancies is provisional and may increase or decrease as per departmental need.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Applicants must satisfy the age and educational qualification prescribed for the specific post as on the date of the notification. Reservations are applicable as per G.O.Ms.No.77, GA (Ser-D) Dept., Dt: 02.08.2023, G.O.Ms.No.07, SW(CV) Dept., Dt: 18.04.2025, and applicable amendments, along with the AP Public Employment (Organisation of Local Cadres and Regulation of Direct Recruitment) Rules. District jurisdiction: This recruitment is limited to Nandyal District, with boundaries as per G.O.Ms.No.192, Revenue (Lands-IV) Dept., dated 02.04.2022 (local candidature rules apply).

content_sections.heading: DSH Nandyal Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: If a candidate holds a qualification equivalent to the one prescribed, they must enclose a copy of the relevant Government Order confirming the equivalence; otherwise the application will be rejected.

rows.educational_qualification: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board
Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board
Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board

content_sections.heading: DSH Nandyal Recruitment Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum age: 18 years Maximum age: 42 years Age reckoned as on: 01.07.2025

rows.category: SC, ST, BC, and EWS candidates

rows.relaxation: 3 years, in addition to the length of service in the armed forces

content_sections.heading: DSH Nandyal Recruitment Application Fee
content_sections.text: The fee must be paid via a demand draft (DD) in favour of the District Coordinator of Hospital Services, Nandyal. Candidates eligible for more than one post must enclose a separate demand draft for each post and apply separately for each.

content_sections.heading: DSH Nandyal Recruitment Salary
content_sections.text: All three notified posts - General Duty Attendant (GDA/MNO/FNO), Post Mortem Assistant, and Office Subordinate - carry a monthly remuneration of Rs. 15,000/-, as applicable from time to time.

content_sections.heading: DSH Nandyal Recruitment Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection is based on a total of 100 marks, distributed as follows: 75% of marks for the aggregate marks obtained in all years of the qualifying examination or its equivalent. Up to 10 marks at the rate of 1.0 mark per completed year after acquiring the requisite qualification (as per the pass certificate), reckoned up to the date of notification. Up to 15% weightage for candidates who have worked on Contract/Outsourcing/Honorarium basis (including COVID-19 service), subject to satisfactory service certified by the competent authority, as per G.O.Ms.No.211, HM&FW (B2) Dept., Dt: 08.05.2021; G.O.Rt.No.573, HM&FW (B2) Dept., Dt: 01.11.2021; and G.O.Rt.No.07, HM&FW (B2) Dept., Dt: 06.01.2022. No weightage is given for non-COVID service rendered for less than six months. For COVID service of less than 6 months, 0.8 marks per completed month is awarded. COVID-19 weightage applies only where the candidate rendered COVID-19 service on Contract/Outsourcing/Honorarium basis and was appointed by the District Collector or another competent authority, duly certified by the controlling officer (DMHO/DCHS/Principal of GMC/Superintendent of GGH). Candidates who rendered contract/outsourcing service outside the Medical & Health Department must mention the contract appointment notification number, year, roster point, and issuing authority. Only candidates who rendered contract service in Government institutions in their respective specialization are considered for contract weightage marks, as per Government Memo No.3740784/B2/2020, dated 14.02.2022. Service certificates not issued in the prescribed Annexure-I format will not be considered.

rows.weightage: 5.0 marks per six months (0.83 marks per completed month)

content_sections.heading: DSH Nandyal Recruitment Required Documents
content_sections.text: Two self-attested sets of the following certificates must be enclosed with the filled-in application: SSC or its equivalent certificate (for date of birth) Pass certificate of the qualification prescribed for the post applied for Marks memos of all years of the qualifying examination or its equivalent Valid registration certificate in the A.P. Para Medical Board/Allied Health Care Sciences Council or other relevant council, where applicable Study certificates from Class 4 to Class 10 from the school where the candidate studied (or, for private study, a local candidature certificate for the preceding 7 years, in the prescribed Appendix-I format) Copy of a valid caste certificate (candidates without one will be treated as OC); SC candidates must produce Community Certificate SC-I/SC-II/SC-III Latest EWS Income & Asset Certificate, valid for 2026-27, for candidates claiming EWS reservation Disability certificate issued through SADAREM, for PWD candidates Service certificate from the concerned controlling officer (DM&HO/DCHS/Principal of GMC/Superintendent of GGH/appointing authority), for candidates claiming Contract/Outsourcing/Honorarium service weightage Ex-servicemen certificate, where applicable The notification states that applications without clear, visible copies of the documents listed above, or missing the required enclosures, will be summarily rejected.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for DSH Nandyal Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Download/access the application proforma from the official portal https://nandyal.ap.gov.in , available from 10:00 AM on 20/07/2026 to 5:30 PM on 27/07/2026. Fill in the application completely and accurately. Attach two self-attested sets of all required certificates as listed above. Enclose the demand draft towards the application fee, drawn in favour of the District Coordinator of Hospital Services, Nandyal (a separate DD is required for each post applied for). Submit the physical application at the specified counters in the Office of the District Coordinator of Hospital Services, Nandyal (within the premises of Government General Hospital, Nandyal), on or before 5:30 PM on 27.07.2026. Obtain a dated acknowledgment from the receiving authority as proof of submission. Note: The notification specifies that only offline/physical applications are accepted. Any application submitted through any other mode will not be entertained under any circumstances.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The tenure of contract/outsourcing appointment is initially one year from the date of joining and may be extended as per Government instructions. Services can be terminated at any time with one month's notice or as directed by the Government. If any submitted certificate is later found fake, the candidate's services will be terminated, salary recovered, and a criminal case filed against the candidate. Selected candidates must compulsorily stay at their bonafide headquarters and abide by applicable Government rules. Furnishing incorrect information or suppressing information can lead to debarment from this and future recruitments conducted by the department. The Collector & District Magistrate, Nandyal / Chairman, District Selection Committee, Nandyal, reserves the right to cancel, alter, or modify the notification, including the number of posts, as per G.O.Ms.No.94, GAD (SER.A), Dated 28.03.2003. The application fee is non-refundable if the notification is cancelled for any reason. The department's decision on acceptance/rejection of candidature and all stages of selection is final and binding. Candidates are advised to keep checking the official district website for further updates.

rows.url: File.No: DSH-14/14/2026-PARAMEDICAL, Dated: 05.06.2026 (Director of Secondary Health, AP, Vijayawada)

faq.question: Q1. What is DSH Nandyal Recruitment 2026 Notification No. 01/2026?
faq.answer: It is an official recruitment notification issued by the Director of Secondary Health, Andhra Pradesh, for filling 19 Paramedical and Supporting Staff posts in DSH facilities of Nandyal District on a contract/outsourcing basis.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in DSH Nandyal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 19 vacancies in total: 14 for General Duty Attendant (GDA/MNO/FNO), 3 for Post Mortem Assistant, and 2 for Office Subordinate. These numbers are provisional and may change based on departmental requirements.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for DSH Nandyal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the physical application is 5:30 PM on 27.07.2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized board for all three posts — GDA/MNO/FNO, Post Mortem Assistant, and Office Subordinate.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for DSH Nandyal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 42 years, reckoned as on 01.07.2025. Age relaxation of 5 years applies for SC/ST/BC/EWS candidates, 3 years plus service length for ex-servicemen, and 10 years for differently abled persons.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 600/- for general (OC) candidates and Rs. 400/- for SC, ST, and BC candidates. The fee is exempted for PWD candidates and must be paid via demand draft in favour of the District Coordinator of Hospital Services, Nandyal.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for GDA, Post Mortem Assistant, and Office Subordinate posts in Nandyal?
faq.answer: All three posts carry a monthly remuneration of Rs. 15,000/-, as applicable from time to time.

faq.question: Q8. Is DSH Nandyal Recruitment 2026 a permanent job?
faq.answer: No. This is a contract/outsourcing engagement with an initial tenure of one year from the date of joining, which may be extended as per Government instructions. The services can also be terminated with one month's notice.

faq.question: Q9. How is the merit list prepared for DSH Nandyal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is out of 100 marks: 75% based on aggregate marks in the qualifying examination, up to 10 marks for completed years of experience after qualification, and up to 15% weightage for prior Contract/Outsourcing/Honorarium service (including COVID-19 duty), subject to a satisfactory service certificate from the competent authority.

faq.question: Q10. How long is the DSH Nandyal Recruitment 2026 merit list valid?
faq.answer: The merit list from this notification is valid for one year and can be used to fill any vacancies that arise during this period.
